subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 160323546 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (UCD) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
160323546/480431194 at 13:06:30.05 UT on the 23rd
of March 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact
not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to local particles."
